change_comments.message: Wondering, do we need a stage job for opa-pdp similar to other components?

Hi Ramesh, we checked https://github.com/lfit/releng-global-jjb/blob/master/docs/jjb/lf-maven-jobs.rst?plain=1 for jobs related to stage. they have mentioned that these are for Java based Projects with Maven as build engine.

For Self Release Jobs, https://github.com/lfit/releng-global-jjb/blob/master/jjb/lf-release-job-groups.yaml we found "{project-name}-gerrit-release-jobs" as relevant so we have added these alone as of now.

As per my recent comment in IT-27520, the new opa-pdp jobs need to be moved so they sit alongside the existing ONAP policy sub-projects, i.e. from jjb/policy-opa-pdp -> jjb/policy. This respects (and mirrors) the code hierarchy in Gerrit. We may end up with automation failures and other issues while these exist here.
We will be doing that change in another Jira ticket, Matthew. This ticket is just limited to adding gerrit release job. Kindly approve this.
The Jira ticket for your comment, Matthew, in IT-27520, for opa-pdp jobs movement is https://lf-onap.atlassian.net/browse/POLICY-5248
